message:
feat(web): Add DotPlotOverlay and SyntenyOverlay with worker integration

- Add DotPlotOverlay for self-similarity matrix visualization showing
  direct and inverted repeats across the genome
- Add SyntenyOverlay for gene order conservation analysis
- Add dotplot.worker.ts for non-blocking dot plot computation
- Register overlays in OverlayManager and OverlayProvider
- Add overlay IDs and exports to index.ts

These overlays complete Phase 3 analysis visualization suite for
identifying terminal repeats, palindromes, gene duplications, and
synteny patterns in phage genomes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
